description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features two large seat cushions and six loose back cushions in varying shades of gray, with some cushions displaying subtle patterns for visual interest. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The legs are short, slender, and dark-colored, slightly recessed beneath the frame, giving the sofa a floating appearance. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven textile, providing a matte, soft finish. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, parks, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy light gray sofa with two seat cushions and six loose, varied gray back cushions, featuring straight armrests and short, recessed dark legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, and all six back cushions in varying shades and patterns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, wide armrest and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the back cushions from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and six loose back cushions in varied sizes and shades, arranged in a single row across the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slender, dark-colored legs, slightly recessed at the corners, with a simple, modern style and no visible ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, supporting six loose back cushions with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle, tightly woven texture; some back cushions feature faint geometric or checkered patterns.
